metadata.desc: An Astrbot plugin for managing QQ groups, designed for HTS Team management. Supports welcome messages, admin management and other features.

default_mute_duration.hint: Default mute duration when not specified

default_welcome_enabled.hint: Whether welcome messages are enabled for new groups

default_welcome_message.hint: Leave empty to use i18n default

max_recall_count.hint: Maximum messages that can be recalled at once

default_announce_confirm_required.hint: Whether announcements require group members to confirm

messages.cmd_global_mute: /bot global_mute / 全员禁言 on|off - Global mute
messages.cmd_ban: /bot ban / 封禁 <QQ> - Kick and ban
messages.cmd_rename: /bot rename / 改名 <QQ> <name> - Change group nickname
messages.cmd_title: /bot title / 头衔 <QQ> <title> - Set special title
messages.cmd_promote: /bot promote / 提升 <QQ> - Promote to admin
messages.cmd_set_group_name: /bot set_group_name / 设置群名 <name> - Change group name
messages.msg_not_in_group: ❌ Please use this command in a group chat
messages.msg_no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to do this
messages.msg_platform_not_supported: ❌ This feature is not supported on current platform
messages.msg_operation_failed: ❌ Operation failed, please try again later
